testsuite.name: com.assetguard.presentation.routes.TelemetryRoutesTest

testcase.name: PATCH sessions end returns 404 when not found
GET heatmap with empty entries returns valid response
PATCH sessions end returns 200 with endedAt
POST sessions returns 201 with session id
GET heatmap with screen filter passes param
POST events without optional fields returns 201
POST events with invalid eventType returns 400
